verses.text: God bids Moses set up the tabernacle on the first day, and place the ark and table. Set up. God appoints the day.
God bids Moses set up the tabernacle on the first day, and place the ark and table. Set up. God appoints the day.
God bids Moses set up the tabernacle on the first day, and place the ark and table. Set up. God appoints the day.
God bids Moses set up the tabernacle on the first day, and place the ark and table. Set up. God appoints the day.
He is to set the altars, the hangings, and the court round about. Arranged. Each thing in its place.
He is to set the altars, the hangings, and the court round about. Arranged. Each thing in its place.
He is to set the altars, the hangings, and the court round about. Arranged. Each thing in its place.
He is to set the altars, the hangings, and the court round about. Arranged. Each thing in its place.
Anoint the tabernacle and all its vessels to sanctify them. Anointed. All is hallowed.
Anoint the tabernacle and all its vessels to sanctify them. Anointed. All is hallowed.
Anoint the tabernacle and all its vessels to sanctify them. Anointed. All is hallowed.
Wash and clothe Aaron and his sons for their everlasting priesthood. Consecrated. The priests are set apart.
Wash and clothe Aaron and his sons for their everlasting priesthood. Consecrated. The priests are set apart.
Wash and clothe Aaron and his sons for their everlasting priesthood. Consecrated. The priests are set apart.
Wash and clothe Aaron and his sons for their everlasting priesthood. Consecrated. The priests are set apart.
Moses rears the tent, as the LORD commanded him. Reared. He obeys to the letter.
Moses rears the tent, as the LORD commanded him. Reared. He obeys to the letter.
Moses rears the tent, as the LORD commanded him. Reared. He obeys to the letter.
Moses rears the tent, as the LORD commanded him. Reared. He obeys to the letter.
He puts the testimony in the ark and sets up the veil. The ark. God's law is housed.
He puts the testimony in the ark and sets up the veil. The ark. God's law is housed.
He sets the table and arranges the shewbread. The table. The bread is placed.
He sets the table and arranges the shewbread. The table. The bread is placed.
He sets the candlestick and lights the lamps before the LORD. The light. The lamps shine.
He sets the candlestick and lights the lamps before the LORD. The light. The lamps shine.
He sets the golden altar and burns sweet incense. Incense. Fragrance rises.
He sets the golden altar and burns sweet incense. Incense. Fragrance rises.
He sets the door hanging and the altar of burnt offering. The altar. Sacrifice is ready.
He sets the door hanging and the altar of burnt offering. The altar. Sacrifice is ready.
He sets the laver, and they wash before serving. The laver. Cleansing precedes service.
He sets the laver, and they wash before serving. The laver. Cleansing precedes service.
He sets the laver, and they wash before serving. The laver. Cleansing precedes service.
He rears the court round about and finishes the work. Finished. The whole is complete.
A cloud covers the tent, and 'the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.' Glory. God comes to dwell.
A cloud covers the tent, and 'the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.' Glory. God comes to dwell.
The cloud leads them in all their journeys, with fire by night. Guided. God's presence goes before them.
The cloud leads them in all their journeys, with fire by night. Guided. God's presence goes before them.
The cloud leads them in all their journeys, with fire by night. Guided. God's presence goes before them.
